title: isodon grandifolius var. grandifolius
intro: Isodon grandifolius var. grandifolius, also known as large-leaved isodon, is a plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is valued for its potential to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, which may provide health benefits such as lowering blood pressure and improving respiratory function. Large-leaved isodon can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for consumption, and it is often used in traditional Chinese medicine.
